name: ecl-lsp-client
description: Language support for SNOMED CT Expression Constraint Language
author: Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation (CSIRO)

editor/context.when: editorLangId == fsh || editorLangId == json || editorLangId == xml || editorLangId == java || editorLangId == typescript || editorLangId == typescriptreact
editorLangId == fsh || editorLangId == json || editorLangId == xml || editorLangId == java || editorLangId == typescript || editorLangId == typescriptreact

ecl.terminology.serverUrl.description: Base URL of the FHIR terminology server used for concept lookup and search

ecl.terminology.timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for concept lookup requests to the terminology server

ecl.formatting.indentSize.description: Number of spaces for each indentation level (when using spaces)

ecl.formatting.indentStyle.description: Use spaces or tabs for indentation

ecl.formatting.spaceAroundOperators.description: Add spaces around logical operators (AND, OR, MINUS)

ecl.formatting.maxLineLength.description: Maximum line length before breaking (0 for unlimited)

ecl.formatting.alignTerms.description: Vertically align term pipes in multi-attribute refinements

ecl.formatting.wrapComments.description: Wrap line comments (//) that exceed the maximum line length

ecl.formatting.breakOnOperators.description: Force a new line before every AND, OR, or MINUS operator

ecl.formatting.breakOnRefinementComma.description: Force a new line after every comma in a refinement attribute list

ecl.formatting.breakAfterColon.description: Force a new line after the refinement colon (:), indenting attributes under the focus concept

ecl.formatting.removeRedundantParenthese.description: Remove parentheses that don't change the meaning of the expression and flatten same-operator nesting

ecl.evaluation.resultLimit.description: Maximum number of concepts to return when evaluating an ECL expression

ecl.terminology.snomedVersion.description: SNOMED CT edition/version URI. Edition-only (e.g. http://snomed.info/sct/32506021000036107) uses the latest version. Pinned (e.g. http://snomed.info/sct/32506021000036107/version/20260131) uses that exact release. Empty uses the server default.

ecl.semanticValidation.enabled.description: Enable semantic validation of ECL expressions (attribute scope, value constraints, empty sub-expressions). Requires FHIR terminology server access.

scripts.prebuild:vsix: npm run compile && npm run bundle && node scripts/bundle-server.js && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('../../LICENSE','LICENSE');require('fs').copyFileSync('../../THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES.txt','THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES.txt')"
